chunks.text: Natacha Crooks is an Assistant Professor in EECS at UC Berkeley. Contact information: ncrooks@berkeley.edu. Links include Personal Homepage, Publications, and Research Support. Frankie Vasquez: fvasquez@berkeley.edu.
chunks.question: What is Natacha Crooks' position at UC Berkeley?

chunks.text: Education: 2019 Ph.D. in Distributed Systems from University of Texas. 2012 BA in Computer Science and Law from University of Cambridge.
chunks.question: Where did Natacha Crooks earn her Ph.D.?

chunks.text: Research Areas: Database Management Systems (DBMS) and Operating Systems & Networking (OSNT). Research Centers: Berkeley Center for Responsible, Decentralized Intelligence (RDI) and Sky Computing Lab (Sky).
chunks.question: What are Natacha Crooks' research areas?

chunks.text: Teaching Schedule: CS 186 Introduction to Database Systems, MoWe 10:00-11:29, Soda 306.
chunks.question: What course does Natacha Crooks teach?

chunks.text: Selected Honors and Awards: Sloan Research Fellow 2025, IEEE CS TCDE Early Career/Rising Star Award 2024, Okawa Research Grant 2023, VMware Early Career Faculty Award 2022, ACM SIGOPS Dennis M. Ritchie Doctoral Dissertation Award 2020.
chunks.question: Which award did Natacha Crooks receive in 2024?
chunks.answer: IEEE CS TCDE Early Career Award.
